vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix tensorizer extra in setup.py
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: extras_require is meant to be a dict of the names of some extra features to lists of dependencies that each requires.

vllm.title: [Misc] Upgrade triton to 2.2.0
vllm.author: esmeetu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Pytorch has already contain triton dependency. We can safely remove it in requirements-cuda.txt.
However pytorch-cpu version doesn't have triton and we can upgrade to 2.2.0.
FIX #4059
FIX Pre-requisite requirements in #3234
